tools.name: search_icons
tools.description: Search svgicons.com icons and return icon metadata. Raw SVG requires a Pro API token with icons:read and mcp:use scopes.

tools.name: search_icon_sets
tools.description: Search icon sets by name, prefix, author, category, or description.

tools.name: get_icon
tools.description: Return one icon by ID. Metadata is public; raw SVG requires a Pro API token with icons:read and mcp:use scopes.

tools.name: export_icon_png
tools.description: Render one icon as PNG or a ZIP of PNG variants. Requires the Pro Plan and an MCP token with icons:read and exports:create scopes.

tools.name: recommend_icons_for_ui
tools.description: Recommend icon candidates for a UI description using svgicons.com search metadata.

tools.name: create_icon_kit
tools.description: Create a persistent Pro Icon Collection and optionally add icon IDs. Requires Pro API token with collections:write and mcp:use scopes.

tools.name: generate_icon_kit_for_project
tools.description: Recommend and persist an Icon Collection for a project brief. Requires Pro API token with collections:write and mcp:use scopes.

tools.name: export_icon_collection
tools.description: Queue a Pro Icon Collection export, including optional PNG packs. Requires an MCP token with exports:create.

tools.name: list_icon_collections
tools.description: List your persistent Icon Collections with icon counts. Requires a Pro API token with collections:read and mcp:use scopes.

tools.name: get_icon_collection
tools.description: Read one Icon Collection with its paginated entries. Custom-icon entries include entryId, customEditId, customName, and their customized SVG snapshot as the body. Requires a Pro API token with collections:read and mcp:use scopes.

tools.name: add_icons_to_collection
tools.description: Add catalog icons to an existing Icon Collection as plain entries (idempotent). Requires a Pro API token with collections:write and mcp:use scopes.

tools.name: remove_icon_from_collection
tools.description: Remove an icon from an Icon Collection. Entry-precise by default: only the plain entry is removed and custom variants survive; set allVariants true to remove every entry of the icon. Requires a Pro API token with collections:write and mcp:use scopes.
